top.name: Magnum Opus
top.rules_text: Choose a card in your hand. It becomes Perfected for the rest of the fight: both halves cost 0 and gain +3 to all damage and healing. Perfected cards are not discarded after use.

bottom.name: Arcane Singularity
bottom.rules_text: Create a Singularity Crystal on a tile (20 HP). All spells cast by anyone within 3 also resolve on the Singularity's tile. You gain 1 charge per spell that hits it.

upgrades.description: Opus perfects harder. Singularity is sturdier.

changes.value: Choose a card. It becomes Perfected: both halves cost 0 and gain +5 to all damage and healing. Not discarded after use.
Create a Singularity Crystal (28 HP). Spells within 3 also resolve on its tile. Gain 1 charge per spell that hits it.
Choose 2 cards. They become Perfected: both halves cost 0 and gain +5 to all damage and healing. Not discarded.
Create a Singularity Crystal (28 HP). Spells within 5 also resolve on its tile. Gain 1 charge per spell that hits it.

upgrades.description: Magnum Opus (Refined): Perfected cards also draw a card when played.

changes.value: Choose 2 cards. They become Perfected: cost 0, +5 to all values, not discarded, and draw 1 when played.

upgrades.description: Devouring Singularity: banks 2 charge per hit.

changes.value: Create a Singularity Crystal (28 HP). Spells within 5 also resolve on it. Gain 2 charge per spell that hits it.

upgrades.description: The Great Work: a masterpiece beyond cost.

changes.value: Choose 3 cards. They become Perfected: cost 0, +7 to all values, Reaction speed, draw 1 when played, never discarded.

upgrades.description: The Heart of Magic: a permanent engine that pulses damage.

changes.value: Create a Singularity Crystal (40 HP). Spells within 5 also resolve on it. Gain 2 charge per hit; it deals 4 to all enemies within 5 each turn.
